creator: un1i@rz.uni-karlsruhe.de
text:
This man page still mentions block devices, which have been removed some
time ago.

Fix: 

--- cd.4	2001/02/06 10:39:35	1.22
+++ cd.4	2001/04/20 00:57:21
@@ -413,10 +413,6 @@
 .Sh FILES
 .Bl -tag -width /dev/rcd[0-9][a-h] -compact
 .It Pa /dev/cd[0-9][a-h]
-block mode
-.Tn CD-ROM
-devices
-.It Pa /dev/rcd[0-9][a-h]
 raw mode
 .Tn CD-ROM
 devices
